name: whatsapp_bridge
description: Bidirectional WhatsApp connector via whatsapp-web.js — REST send + webhook receive on port 3847
author: edison
purpose: Node.js connector providing bidirectional WhatsApp messaging via whatsapp-web.js with LocalAuth. Exposes REST API for sending and webhook push for receiving. Handles text, audio, images, video, documents, vcard, and stickers.
architecture: Auth: QR code pairing (first run), session persistence after
Send: REST API with rate limiting (20 msgs/min sliding window)
